name: guariglia-baseball-scorecard-builder-v21
description: Guariglia Baseball Scorecard Builder Version 21 with pitch-by-pitch ball/strike counting, phone and keyboard controls, quick result codes, classic scorecard exports, and schedule lookup

scripts.check:js: node --check app.js && node --check baseball-data.js && node --check service-worker.js
